quality.rationale: 基于康普顿波长估算真空能密度并与观测边界对比，涉及跨尺度物理推理与宇宙学常数问题背景

origin.question: Problem 13.4. In relativistic quantum mechanics empty space contains virtual particles. It is speculated that the vacuum therefore, has a nonzero stress-energy.(2) Suppose that the vacuum energy is due to the rest mass of virtual protons or electrons, produced with an average spacing of their Comp- ton wavelength. Is such vacuum stress-energy ruled out by observa- tions?
origin.answer: 是，该模型估计的真空能量密度约为 $10^{96}\,\text{kg/m}^3$，比实际天文观测上限高出超过120个数量级，因此被观测严格排除。
